name: yahoo-finance-price
description: Reads public Yahoo Finance chart prices and flattens them into OHLCV records. Read-only. In architecture v2 this quarantine bundle dispatches live reads through a Tier-2 hook that delegates to the legacy connector until the wave 6 cutover.

risk.read: external Yahoo Finance Price API reads performed by the legacy connector via a Tier-2 hook

conformance.reason: Tier-2 hook-owned quarantine migration: internal/connectors/hooks/yahoo-finance-price delegates Check/Read to legacy internal/connectors/yahoo-finance-price, so conformance dynamic replay of the declarative shadow path is intentionally skipped. Static schema/docs/surface checks still run; behavior is covered by the hook unit tests and the existing legacy connector tests during the pre-cutover period.
